parameters.content: AutoApplyOps accepts a sanitized internship application payload, validates required fields, scores fit, routes priority, and returns a follow-up draft.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => ({ json: { ...item.json, notificationChannel: 'fast-response', ownerAction: 'Review today and send follow-up draft' } }));
return items.map((item) => ({ json: { ...item.json, notificationChannel: 'batch-review', ownerAction: 'Review during the next application batch' } }));
return items.map((item) => ({ json: { ...item.json, notificationChannel: 'manual-repair', ownerAction: 'Fix required fields and replay payload' } }));
